brands.name: ZYN
brands.description: Global nicotine pouch brand focused on tobacco-free mint, citrus, coffee, and fruit variants across multiple strengths and sizes.

brands.name: VELO
brands.description: Mainstream tobacco-free pouch brand with broad fruit and mint coverage across mini and slim formats.

brands.name: LOOP
brands.description: Flavor-led Scandinavian nicotine pouch brand built around bold fruit, mint, coffee, and chili combinations.

brands.name: Nordic Spirit
brands.description: Widely distributed tobacco-free pouch brand with straightforward mint, berry, fruit, and coffee offerings.

brands.name: Helwit
brands.description: Swedish pouch brand made in Smaland with a broad line of fruit, mint, floral, and coffee profiles.

brands.name: XQS
brands.description: Long-running Scandinavian nicotine pouch brand known for playful flavor development and broad international distribution.

brands.name: On!
brands.description: Compact tobacco-free pouch brand best known for discreet mini-format products and straightforward mint, berry, and coffee lines.

brands.name: KILLA
brands.description: Strong, flavor-heavy pouch brand with a focus on intense mint and candy-fruit profiles.

brands.name: Siberia
brands.description: High-strength Nordic nicotine brand centered on cold mint and extreme nicotine delivery.

brands.name: Après
brands.description: Swedish tobacco-free nicotine pouch brand with design-led positioning and a broad multi-format flavor lineup.

brands.name: Übbs
brands.description: UK-focused tobacco-free pouch brand positioned around pharmaceutical-grade production and approachable flavor-led products.

products.name: Mint
products.description: Sweet mint profile in Helwit's regular slim format for a gentle, steady nicotine release.

products.name: Banana
products.description: Creamy ripe-banana pouch built for a softer everyday nicotine profile.

products.name: Violet
products.description: Floral violet pouch in a lighter regular strength with Helwit's slim fit.

products.name: Blueberry
products.description: Juicy blueberry pouch with Helwit's regular fruit-forward profile.

products.name: Blueberry Extra Strong
products.description: Extra-strong blueberry version of one of Helwit's core fruit flavors.

products.name: Banana Extra Strong
products.description: Sweet tropical banana pouch with Helwit's stronger nicotine delivery.

products.name: Violet Extra Strong
products.description: Extra-strong floral violet pouch designed for users who want more nicotine without leaving the profile.

products.name: Cola
products.description: Sweet fizzy-cola pouch built around a lighter regular-strength release.

products.name: Mocha
products.description: Coffee-caramel pouch with a dessert-like profile and Helwit's regular 3/4 strength.

products.name: Menthol
products.description: Stronger menthol step-up from Helwit's classic mint profile.

products.name: Salmiak
products.description: Salmiak liquorice pouch with Helwit's higher 4/4 strength profile.

products.name: Acai
products.description: Limited-edition acai pouch with a tart berry-led profile in Helwit's lighter strength band.

products.name: Watermelon
products.description: Fresh watermelon pouch introduced through Helwit's concept line and carried in regular 2/4 strength.

products.name: Orange
products.description: Bright orange-flavored pouch in Helwit's regular 3/4 strength range.

products.name: Red Chili Melon Strong
products.description: Melon and red chili pouch with LOOP's regular strong profile.

products.name: Red Chili Melon Hyper Strong
products.description: Hyper-strong version of LOOP's chili-melon profile with the same hot-sweet flavor lane.

products.name: Blackcurrant Strong
products.description: Cassis and wild-berry pouch in LOOP's standard strong format.

products.name: Blueberry Ice Strong
products.description: Blueberry and peppermint profile with LOOP's regular strong nicotine level.

products.name: Creamy Cappuccino Strong
products.description: Creamy coffee pouch with hazelnut-style notes and LOOP's strong-format nicotine delivery.

products.name: Hot Rhubarb Strong
products.description: Sweet rhubarb pouch lifted with green chili in LOOP's standard strong strength.

products.name: Hot Mango Extra Strong
products.description: Mango, lime, and chili profile delivered in LOOP's extra-strong format.

products.name: Jalapeño Lime Extra Strong
products.description: Green chili and lime pouch in LOOP's extra-strong variant.

products.name: Jalapeño Lime Hyper Strong
products.description: Hyper-strong version of LOOP's jalapeño and lime profile.

products.name: Habanero Mint Hyper Strong
products.description: Fresh mint pouch with a habanero-style spice note and LOOP's highest strength tier.

products.name: Spicy Apple Strong
products.description: Fresh green apple pouch with LOOP's spicy twist in regular strong strength.

products.name: Smooth Papaya 8mg
products.description: Papaya-flavored slim pouch with tropical flavor notes.

products.name: Mango Ice 10mg
products.description: Slim pouch combining mango flavor with a cooling finish.

products.name: Blueberry Ice 8mg
products.description: Blueberry-led fruit pouch in VELO's slim format.

products.name: Sweet Papaya 8mg
products.description: Papaya pouch from VELO's fruit line with a sweeter tropical profile.

products.name: Wintry Watermelon 17mg
products.description: VELO's highest-strength wintry watermelon slim pouch.

products.name: Orange Spark 10mg
products.description: Orange-flavored slim pouch from VELO's citrus-led lineup.

products.name: Orange Spark 17mg
products.description: High-strength orange slim pouch in VELO's Orange Spark range.

products.name: Minty Lemon 10mg
products.description: Lemon-led VELO pouch sharpened with a minty cooling note.

products.name: Peppermint Storm 11mg
products.description: Cool menthol-forward slim pouch in VELO's Peppermint Storm line.

products.name: Peppermint Storm 14mg
products.description: Stronger Peppermint Storm slim pouch for users who want more menthol intensity.

products.name: Peppermint Storm 17mg

products.description: Higher-strength Freezing Peppermint pouch in VELO's slim can format.

products.name: Creamy Latte 6mg
products.description: Mini coffee-style pouch with a creamy latte profile.
